title: 20 x Bamboo Wooden Pegs Strong Clothes Giant Pegs for Washing Line and Hanging Pictures, Arts and Craft
features: Biodegradable Bamboo pegs are natural and long lasting making them the perfect laundry essential for your home
Perfect for hanging clothes, but also for sealing packets of food or coffee, craft, holding things up, clipping things together etc etc!
Made from sustainable, biodegradable bamboo wood with a strong 7 ring steel spring
Bamboo clothes pegs are an environmentally friendly and sustainable alternative to plastic pegs plus they are incredibly strong and durable in harsh UV conditions
To prolong the life of the pegs and to prevent mould, keep dry in-between use
description: Bamboo pegs are natural and long lasting making them the perfect laundry essential for your home. Supplied in a pack of 20 these Bamboo wooden pegs have been crafted from quality Bamboo wood and feature an anti-rust stainless steel spring. These sturdy bamboo wooden pegs are lightweight and are a great essential to peg your washing on the line and keep it secured until you take it down Bamboo pegs are natural and long lasting making them the perfect laundry essential for your home Perfect for hanging clothes, but also for sealing packets of food or coffee, craft, holding things up, clipping things together etc etc! Made from sustainable, biodegradable bamboo wood with a strong 7 ring steel spring. Bamboo clothes pegs are an environmentally friendly and sustainable alternative to plastic pegs plus they are incredibly strong and durable in harsh UV conditions. To prolong the life of the pegs and to prevent mould, keep dry in-between use. Packaging - reusable 'matchbox style' cardboard box Box of 20 Eco friendly Bamboo Pegs
